videos.title: Canvas API Crash Course
videos.description: Comprehensive crash course covering all major Canvas API features with hands-on examples.

videos.title: HTML5 Canvas Tutorial for Beginners
videos.description: Beginner-friendly introduction to drawing shapes, paths, text, and images on canvas.

videos.title: Canvas Animation Tutorial
videos.description: Learn smooth animation techniques using requestAnimationFrame and delta-time calculations.

videos.title: JavaScript Canvas Image Processing
videos.description: Tutorial on pixel manipulation, image filters, and processing with Canvas getImageData/putImageData.

videos.title: Build a Canvas Drawing App
videos.description: Step-by-step guide to building a complete drawing application from scratch.

videos.title: Canvas Game Development Tutorial
videos.description: Build a complete game using Canvas, covering sprites, collision detection, and game loops.

videos.title: High-Performance Canvas Techniques
videos.description: Optimization techniques including off-screen canvas, dirty rectangles, and batch rendering.

videos.title: Creative Coding with Canvas and JavaScript
videos.description: Explore creative coding techniques: particle systems, generative art, and data visualization on canvas.
